user.title: Connect to Lunergy Battery
user.description: Enter the local network details for your Lunergy EMS battery hub. The battery must be reachable at the given IP before you can continue.

data_description.host: Static local IP of your battery (e.g. 192.168.0.100)
data_description.port: TCP port the battery listens on (typically 8080)
data_description.name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect – check the IP, port, and that the battery is online.
error.unknown: Unexpected error – see the Home Assistant log for details.

init.title: Reconfigure Lunergy Battery
init.description: Update the connection details. Home Assistant will reconnect immediately.

data_description.extended_power: By default, local control is limited to 800W. Enable this to allow power up to 2400W by writing register 3039. This is the same setting the AECC app uses when you configure power above 800W.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect – check the IP, port, and that the battery is online.
error.unknown: Unexpected error – see the Home Assistant log for details.
